STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DRAIN: A player loses HP. They gain Energy. You heal the same amount.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_PASS_: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Exhaust a player's hand. For each, gain 1 Strength and draw 1 card.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_YOUR_: Deal damage to a player equal to their Block. Upgrade: +5 damage.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_EVERY: All players Exhaust their hands, then each draws as many as they had.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_NO_CA: Draw cards. Each other player loses Energy.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SERPE: Each living player adds Shivs to their hand.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DEPLO: Each player Auto-Plays an Infinite Blades.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TOO_M: A player draws cards and gains Weak.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_MINIO: All Minion Strikes in hands become upgraded.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: Costs Stars. Each player adds an upgraded Particle Wall to hand.
Apply a Doom threshold to all players.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GROUP: All players gain doubled attack damage and a Doom threshold.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BLOOD: For several turns, enemies deal double damage to all players with this debuff.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CORPS: Damage an enemy. Other players lose HP.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHOCK: Channel Lightning Orbs for a player.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_STATU: Each other player Exhausts a random hand card. Draw that many.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BRAIN: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Discover a Power from another character pool; add it to hand and it costs 0 this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ALL_O: Drain all Energy from other players to you. Gain Crash.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_FOUR_: Apply Poison to all hittable enemies.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CHECK: Apply DPS Check to a player.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_COOL_: Apply a Doom threshold to all players.
